module.name: HTML
module.param: Home > Admin > Run Health Checks for Indexing and Field Extraction problems

module.name: Search
module.param: | stats count | fields - count | eval severity_level=split("critical,info",",") | mvexpand severity_level | eval section_title=if(severity_level=="critical", "Critical Health Checks", "Other Health Checks")

module.name: HTML
module.param:
This page will run a series of health checks.
If you see failures here or have questions about this page, email Sideview support at support@sideviewapps.com.

module.name: Search
module.param:
| rest /servicesNS/-/-/configs/conf-checklist splunk_server=local | rename eai:appName as app search as searchToRun | search title="$severity_level$_*" | fields title app searchToRun drilldown | append [ | rest /services/apps/local splunk_server=local | fields title label author | rename title as app ] | eventstats last(author) as author by app | stats values(*) as * by app title | search author="Sideview, LLC"
| eval drilldownLabel=if(isnull(drilldown),"see health check results","run troubleshooting search") | eval drilldown=if(isnull(drilldown),searchToRun,drilldown)
